text:
Update from v1.4.14 to v1.4.15

ChangeLog :
===========

2011/04/08 : 1.4.15
    - [CRITICAL] fix risk of crash when dealing with space in response cookies

Fix: PORTNAME=      haproxy

+PORTVERSION=   1.4.15
